items.title: 2026 NASCAR Odds: Christopher Bell Favored For North Wilkesboro
items.summary: NASCAR is heading to North Wilkesboro for the first points race at the track in 30 years. Who will take the checkered flag? Here are the latest odds.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Duckett 141 trumps Rohit 138 in Lord's run-fest
items.summary: England set India 388 in this series decider, and then refused to blink with the ball to secure a 2-1 series win - their first against India since 2018
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
